description_long: This object is a wooden chest with a rectangular base and a curved, hinged lid. The exterior is constructed from light-colored wooden planks, reinforced with dark metal bands running vertically and horizontally for structural support. The lid is partially open, revealing a spacious, empty interior suitable for storage. The wood grain is visible, giving the chest a rustic, weathered appearance, while the metal bands show slight discoloration, suggesting age or frequent use. There are no visible handles or decorative markings on the chest. The overall design is utilitarian, making it suitable for storing items in urban or outdoor environments.
description: A rustic wooden chest with a curved, hinged lid and dark metal reinforcement bands, featuring a spacious interior and a weathered appearance.
description_view_0: Front view of the closed chest, showing the curved lid and metal bands running vertically and horizontally.
description_view_1: Side view with the lid partially open, revealing the thickness of the wood and the empty interior.
description_view_2: Front view with the lid fully open, clearly displaying the empty storage space inside.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the lid open, highlighting the construction of the lid and the side planks.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal bands on lid and body
